# CWE-323 safe: Reusing a Nonce, Key Pair in Encryption (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-323-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/aes"
	"crypto/cipher"
	"crypto/rand"
	"database/sql"
	"io"
)

func StoreEncryptedNote(db *sql.DB, userID string, plaintext []byte) error {
	key := []byte("0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef")
	block, err := aes.NewCipher(key)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	aead, err := cipher.NewGCM(block)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	nonce := make([]byte, aead.NonceSize())
	if _, err := io.ReadFull(rand.Reader, nonce); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	ciphertext := aead.Seal(nil, nonce, plaintext, nil)
	payload := append(nonce, ciphertext...)
	_, err = db.Exec("UPDATE notes SET blob = ? WHERE owner = ?", payload, userID)
	return err
}
